template.name: Ingest batch data for allocation file
template.description: When an allocation file is received, the file totals are added to the main Clearing account and the file specific account for consistency checks

financial_statements_impact.description: Asset-to-asset reclassification within Master FBO - Clearing (10101): Clearing Total debit balance increases and the per-file Clearing instance credit balance increases equally. Total economic ledger assets unchanged.

template.trigger: An allocation file arrives and passes validation. Fires once per allocation file before any per-consumer allocation events (T5101) for that file.

ledger_scope_descriptions.economic_ledger: Economic ledger (ID 5001) where the batch header establishes the per-file clearing balance under Master FBO - Clearing (10101).

accounting_treatments.description: Establish the per-file clearing balance by transferring the file total from the permanent Clearing Total to a per-file Clearing instance; no P&L impact.

account_code_validations.description: Permanent accumulator account (Master FBO - Clearing Total) on the economic ledger; debited once per allocation file for the file total.
Per-file clearing instance (Master FBO - Clearing) on the economic ledger; credited with the file total, then drawn down to zero by per-consumer allocation events (T5101 leg 1).

statement_file_id.description: Bank statement file reference linking this allocation file to the corresponding bank statement whose Master FBO Control (10102) instance carries the batch balance.

expected_line_count.description: Number of consumer line items expected in this allocation file, for monitoring and reconciliation.

allocation_file_id.description: Allocation file reference used to create/select the per-file Clearing (10101) instance and for batch traceability.

variables.description: Static: Master FBO - Clearing Total (10101) — single permanent accumulator, always the same.
variables.name: clearing_total

legs.description: Establish per-file clearing balance from the allocation file total.

examples.name: batch_header_10k
examples.description: Batch header for a $10,000.00 allocation file (alloc-2026-02-23-001) linked to bank statement stmt-2026-02-23-A, with 2 expected consumer line items ($8k Customer A + $2k Customer B).
